execute.stdout:
hi -> short
hello -> medium
goodmorning -> long
ok -> short

code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  mut done = false
  while not done
    match io.read_line()
    when Some(line)
      let n = string.len(line)
      if n == 0
        ()
      else if n <= 3
        println("#{line} -> short")
      else if n <= 7
        println("#{line} -> medium")
      else
        println("#{line} -> long")
      end
    when None
      done = true
    end
  end
end
